title: Promote the verified release candidate metadata
outOfScope: Executing the external release workflow before this PR is merged.

sources.reason: Published release identity required by the release workflow.
Candidate metadata that must advance from the newly published release.
Workflow contract requiring release.json tag identity and candidate consistency.

riskAssessment.reason: Metadata promotion is bounded and the release workflow remains the external evidence authority.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the complete serial remediation loop, including release preparation and cleanup.

preReviewWarnings: Verify published tag identity, candidate advancement, and no premature external operation.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: release.json declares v0.5.33 as the release identity required by the workflow.
next-release.json advances to a v0.5.34 candidate based on v0.5.33.
The release workflow remains the authority for final publication evidence.
guidelines: Do not claim publication success without workflow evidence.

intent.problem: The release workflow requires the published metadata to match the tag input before it can produce v0.5.33 evidence.
constraints: Promote only metadata; do not change workflow security controls.
Do not claim publication until the merged-main release workflow succeeds.
intent.rationale: Advancing published metadata and the next candidate makes the release workflow inputs internally consistent while preserving fail-closed evidence checks.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Published and next-candidate metadata form a valid sequential pair.
External publication remains conditional on the release workflow.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized automatic release preparation, PR merge, publication workflow, and branch cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
